name: ed-agent
description: Ed Agent — a mission-swappable one-person development army. One requirement drives nine human-gated lifecycle stages with a squad that swaps by domain (code · marketing · contract · regulated-finance), a learning memory that remembers your preferences, real artifacts at every stage, and a quantified Ed_agents_Claude.md ledger. Drop it into any bot via MCP or the AGENTS.md brief. Core is zero-dependency.

scripts.example: node bin/ed-agent.mjs "Build a KYC onboarding step for an Australian retail broker — Enhanced Due Diligence with source of funds"
